definitions.text: The boundary line of a surface.
A one-dimensional face of a polytope. In particular, the joining line between two vertices of a polygon; the place where two faces of a polyhedron meet.

examples: I have the edge on him.

definitions.text: To move an object slowly and carefully in a particular direction.
examples: He edged the book across the table.
The muggers edged her into an alley and demanded money.

definitions.text: To move slowly and carefully in a particular direction.
To win by a small margin.
